title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
innovation_summary: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation: To address this gap, we introduce OpenCoF, a framework comprising the OpenCoF-17K dataset, a reasoning video dataset spanning 11 task families, and Wan-CoF, a fine-tuned video.
